comparison_surface_note: Compares official Configuration clientbound registry_data framed packet id, DIMENSION_TYPE registry key body, and empty entry-list body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Configuration clientbound registry_data framed dispatch/decode; not real registry contents, registry hydration, Configuration completion, Play entry, or runtime behavior.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Configuration clientbound registry_data packet framing and dispatch/decode for an official DIMENSION_TYPE registry-key fixture with an official empty entry list only; it does not prove real registry contents, RegistrySynchronization.packRegistries output, registry hydration, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
